title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
changelog: Fix Keycloak authentication: add keycloak addon so Cloudron auto-injects KEYCLOAK_URL; start.sh resolves URL from config.env > Cloudron addon > localhost and logs it on startup.
